name: Gaia Blaze, the Force of the Sun
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>烈</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>日</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じつ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>騎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>ガイアブレイズ
name_jp_tl: Gaia Blaze, the Knight of the Scorching Sun
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
If this attacking card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: It can make a second attack in a row. Once per turn, at the end of the Battle Phase: You can target FIRE monsters in your GY up to the number of monsters this card destroyed by battle this turn; add them to your hand.
mnst_eff:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
If this attacking card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: It can make a second attack in a row. Once per turn, at the end of the Battle Phase: You can target FIRE monsters in your GY up to the number of monsters this card destroyed by battle this turn; add them to your hand.
eff:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuner monsters
If this attacking card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: It can make a second attack in a row. Once per turn, at the end of the Battle Phase: You can target FIRE monsters in your GY up to the number of monsters this card destroyed by battle this turn; add them to your hand.

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
summoning: Does not require specific Synchro Materials
misc: At the end of the Battle Phase
